output:
# One-Day High-Protein Meal Plan for Muscle Building

**Athlete Profile:** 180cm, 85kg | Goal: Muscle & Strength | Daily Target: ~3,400 calories, 170g protein

---

## **BREAKFAST** (7:00 AM)
*~750 calories | 35g protein*

- 3 whole eggs + 2 egg whites scrambled
- 1 cup oatmeal with berries
- 1 banana
- 1 tbsp almond butter
- Black coffee or green tea

---

## **MID-MORNING SNACK** (10:00 AM)
*~300 calories | 30g protein*

- Greek yogurt (200g, 0% fat)
- 50g granola
- Handful of almonds (30g)

---

## **LUNCH** (1:00 PM)
*~850 calories | 50g protein*

- 200g grilled chicken breast
- 1.5 cups brown rice
- Mixed vegetables (broccoli, carrots, peppers)
- 1 tbsp olive oil for cooking
- Side salad with balsamic vinegar

---

## **PRE-WORKOUT SNACK** (3:30 PM)
*~250 calories | 25g protein*

- Protein shake: 1 scoop whey protein + 1 cup whole milk + 1 banana + 1 tbsp honey

---

## **DINNER** (7:00 PM)
*~800 calories | 45g protein*

- 200g lean ground beef (93/7)
- 250g sweet potato
- Steamed broccoli (2 cups)
- 1 tbsp coconut oil
- Seasoning (garlic, herbs)

---

## **EVENING SNACK** (9:30 PM)
*~350 calories | 35g protein*

- Cottage cheese (250g, 2%)
- 50g mixed berries
- 30g almonds

---

## **DAILY TOTALS**
- **Calories:** ~3,300
- **Protein:** 220g (26% of calories)
- **Carbs:** 380g (46% of calories)
- **Fats:** 90g (25% of calories)

---

## **HYDRATION & NOTES**
- Drink 3-4 liters of water daily
- Time carbs around workouts for optimal performance
- Adjust portions based on hunger and training intensity
- Consider a multivitamin for micronutrient coverage

output:
# One-Day Meal Plan for Boxing Athlete

**Daily Target:** ~2,400 calories | 180g protein | 240g carbs | 65g fat

---

## **BREAKFAST** (6:00 AM)
*Pre-training fuel*
- 3 whole eggs + 2 egg whites scrambled
- 1 cup oatmeal with cinnamon
- 1 medium banana
- 1 tbsp almond butter

**Macros:** 550 cal | 28g protein | 65g carbs | 15g fat

---

## **PRE-TRAINING SNACK** (9:30 AM)
*Light, quick energy*
- Rice cakes (2) with honey
- 1 medium apple

**Macros:** 200 cal | 2g protein | 50g carbs | 0.5g fat

---

## **LUNCH** (1:00 PM)
*Post-training recovery*
- 200g grilled chicken breast
- 1.5 cups white rice
- Steamed broccoli (2 cups)
- 1 tbsp olive oil for cooking

**Macros:** 650 cal | 55g protein | 75g carbs | 12g fat

---

## **AFTERNOON SNACK** (4:00 PM)
- 150g lean ground turkey patty (homemade)
- Sweet potato (medium, baked)
- Small side salad with olive oil dressing

**Macros:** 350 cal | 40g protein | 35g carbs | 8g fat

---

## **DINNER** (7:00 PM)
- 180g salmon fillet (baked)
- 1 cup quinoa
- Roasted vegetables (carrots, zucchini, bell peppers)
- 1 tbsp coconut oil

**Macros:** 650 cal | 55g protein | 65g carbs | 18g fat

---

## **KEY NOTES:**
✓ **Caloric deficit:** ~500 cal/day = ~0.5 kg/week loss (safe for athletes)  
✓ **High protein:** Preserves muscle during weight loss  
✓ **Timing:** Carbs around training for performance  
✓ **Whole foods only:** No processed items  
✓ **Dairy-free:** Uses olive oil, coconut oil, nuts for healthy fats  

**Hydration:** 3-4 liters water daily + electrolytes during training

output:
# One-Day Marathon Preparation Meal Plan
**For: 180cm, 72kg Athlete | Carbohydrate Loading Focus**

---

## BREAKFAST (7:00 AM)
**Carb-Loading Oatmeal Bowl**
- 1.5 cups cooked oatmeal
- 1 banana, sliced
- 2 tbsp honey
- 1 tbsp almond butter
- ½ cup berries
- 1 cup low-fat milk

**Nutrition:** ~650 cal | 110g carbs | 18g protein | 12g fat

---

## MID-MORNING SNACK (10:00 AM)
**Energy Boost**
- 2 slices whole grain toast
- 2 tbsp jam
- 1 medium apple

**Nutrition:** ~280 cal | 58g carbs | 6g protein | 2g fat

---

## LUNCH (1:00 PM)
**Pasta Power Bowl**
- 2 cups cooked pasta (white or whole wheat)
- 150g grilled chicken breast
- 1 cup marinara sauce
- 2 cups mixed vegetables (zucchini, bell peppers)
- 1 tbsp olive oil

**Nutrition:** ~750 cal | 95g carbs | 42g protein | 12g fat

---

## AFTERNOON SNACK (4:00 PM)
**Quick Carbs + Protein**
- 1 large bagel
- 2 tbsp peanut butter
- 1 banana

**Nutrition:** ~420 cal | 62g carbs | 16g protein | 10g fat

---

## DINNER (7:00 PM)
**Endurance Dinner**
- 200g baked salmon
- 1.5 cups white rice
- 1.5 cups steamed broccoli
- 1 tbsp olive oil drizzle

**Nutrition:** ~700 cal | 85g carbs | 38g protein | 14g fat

---

## EVENING SNACK (9:30 PM)
**Recovery Support**
- 1 cup Greek yogurt (low-fat)
- ½ cup granola
- ½ cup honey

**Nutrition:** ~280 cal | 48g carbs | 15g protein | 4g fat

---

## **DAILY TOTALS**
- **Calories:** ~3,680 kcal
- **Carbohydrates:** 458g (50% of intake) ✓
- **Protein:** 135g (15% of intake)
- **Fat:** 54g (13% of intake)
- **Hydration:** 3-4L water + electrolyte drinks during training

---

## **Key Notes for Marathon Prep:**
✓ High carbohydrate ratio supports glycogen loading  
✓ Adequate protein for muscle recovery  
✓ Easily digestible foods to prevent GI distress  
✓ Spread meals 3 hours apart for optimal absorption  
✓ Adjust portions based on training intensity that day
